stories.title: ReplayPreview component — step-by-step replay in sidebar chat
stories.notes: Steps animate in with 400ms stagger; confirm button appears after 1.5s

stories.title: Correction textarea sub-card embedded in ReplayPreview
stories.notes: confirm-correction action calls POST /api/agents/build with correction text

stories.title: AGENT_MATCH_FOUND card with Activate Agent / Fork & Customise CTAs
stories.notes: Match score bar + two CTAs; differentiated from OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY

stories.title: Show Me postMessage bridge — host-page teach-me mode entry
stories.notes: r4mi:show-me → loader dispatches CustomEvent → React navigates to policy tab + sets demoMode

stories.title: Recording banner on host page during teach-me mode
stories.notes: Superseded by US-10 (banner removed from host page; recording indicator in sidebar only)

stories.title: Voice narration in capture.js (teach-me mode)
stories.notes: SpeechRecognition API; step_description populated; null if unavailable

stories.title: Screenshots in teach-me mode via html2canvas
stories.notes: JPEG 0.6 quality; lazy-injected html2canvas; 500ms failsafe timeout

stories.title: Run button + data-testid on AgentverseDrawer agent cards
stories.notes: Fixes latent E2E failure — data-testid was missing from agent cards

stories.title: /kanban route with live story status board
stories.notes: Reads kanban.json on each request; auto-refreshes every 30s

stories.title: Remove host-page automation elements — green Automate button + ApprovalGate
stories.notes: All automation UI now exclusively in sidebar; fields fill without blocking gates; E2E updated for sidebar frame selectors

stories.title: Live capture feedback panel in sidebar during recording
stories.notes: Shows live voice transcript, last captured element, and screenshot thumbnail while recording

stories.title: Suppress OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY when agent already published (dedup)
stories.notes: Permit-type fallback added — vector similarity may diverge between trace and spec embeddings

stories.title: Playwright always-on video recording (slowMo=800ms) + GitHub artifact upload
stories.notes: video: on; slowMo: 800ms default; artifacts uploaded for 7 days on each CI run

stories.title: Fix GitHub Actions CI — backend startup timeout
stories.notes: Backend fails to start in CI. Fixed: npx -y flags, npm ci for e2e deps, diagnostic logging. Awaiting verification. Fallback: run Playwright locally and screen-record.

stories.title: Update PROGRESS.md and kanban with CI blocker + decision point
stories.notes: Documented current state, sprint history, what E2E covers vs doesn't, and options if CI can't be fixed

stories.title: Phase-based sidebar state machine replacing chat thread
stories.notes: Sidebar is now a phase machine: idle → recording → detected → replay → publishing → agents. Each phase is a distinct screen, not a chat message.

stories.title: HITL replay drives host page navigation with per-step approval
stories.notes: Replay navigates host page tabs (GIS, Policy, Form), fills fields with typing animation, waits for user approval at each step. New POST /api/agents/preview endpoint resolves step values from seed data. r4mi:navigate-tab and r4mi:replay-step postMessage handlers added.

stories.title: CLI/terminal aesthetic for sidebar and agentverse
stories.notes: Monospace fonts, dark terminal colors, log-line style output, minimal UI chrome. Looks like a developer tool, not a chat app.

stories.title: Bug fixes: form state persistence, stale agent cleanup, inbox navigation
stories.notes: Tabs use display:none (not conditional render) so form state persists. Form fields reset on app switch. Demo startup clears stale agents + non-seeded sessions to prevent AGENT_MATCH_FOUND instead of OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY.
